  • Uses of MethodInfo in dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator

    Methods in dev.morphia.critter.parser.generator with parameters of type MethodInfo
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    CritterGenerator.nestmateAccessor(Class<?> entityType, MethodInfo method)
    Generates a nestmate accessor for the property exposed by the given getter method and registers the instance in NestmateAccessorRegistry.
    PropertyAccessorGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyAccessor(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyAccessorGenerator for the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the property exposed by the given getter method.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.
    PropertyModelGenerator
    CritterGenerator.propertyModelGenerator(Class<?> entityType, Class<?> annotationSource, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method, boolean runtimeMode)
    Generates and registers a PropertyModelGenerator for the given method, reading annotations from annotationSource.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    byte[]
    CritterGenerator.methodAccessors(Class<?> entityType, List<MethodInfo> methods)
    Generates bytecode augmenting the entity with synthetic __readXxx/__writeXxx methods for its getter methods.

    Creates a generator for a method-based (getter) property.
     
    VarHandleAccessorGenerator(Class<?> entity, CritterClassLoader critterClassLoader, MethodInfo method)
    Creates a generator for a method-based property accessor using MethodHandles.

    Constructor
    Description
     
    AddMethodAccessorMethods(Class<?> entity, List<MethodInfo> methods)
    Creates a generator that will add accessor methods for the given getter methods to the entity class.
